extraction.one_line_summary: CARTHY attacked from the start over three HC climbs, built winning gap through sustained tempo over Lukmanier and Oberalp, held off DENNIS counterattack on Furka descent.
tactical_patterns: CARTHY exploited early positioning on first climb when favorites expected late-race selection, accumulating time across multiple summits rather than single explosive move.
DENNIS waited until final descent to attack BERNAL, revealing INEOS allowed liberty only when GC mathematically secure via time gaps.
KONRAD climbed into podium via survival while others cracked in sunny conditions, showing heat management separated final GC positions more than climbing strength.

rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: sustained tempo over three consecutive HC climbs from race start indicates exceptional diesel engine suited to ultra-long efforts
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: negative: attacked near Furka summit but couldn't gap BERNAL despite being fresher, suggests climbing deficit persisted even with GC pressure removed
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: marked DENNIS attack on final descent while defending 22 seconds, showing superior descending confidence and race management for stage race victory
rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: positive: climbed onto podium via attrition while others wilted in heat, indicating superior thermoregulation as tactical asset in hot mountain stages
rider_signals.ŠPILAK Simon: negative: drifted back from seventh place despite earlier breakaway attempt on Oberalp, revealing single-effort capacity without recovery for sustained climbing
